text: Being in this place, I am struck by the clean, modern architecture and the feeling of anticipation that always seems to linger in rooms meant for meetings or collaboration. There is a sense of order and potential, yet also an emptiness—a waiting for ideas to fill the space. Moving into the next area, the colorful R+D display catches my attention. It makes me wonder about the pursuit of progress and how innovation is celebrated, almost like an art form. I feel curious and reflective, surrounded by messages that encourage exploration and human ingenuity.
